base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of small_mario_swim — a character (playable) from 1985 super mario bros. underwater-level stroke animation. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: 3-frame swim cycle — underwater-level stroke animation; arms and legs kick in sequence
